description: String comparison is NUL-transparent: _strcmp compares by length (min(len1,len2) bytes then length) instead of stopping at the first \x00. 'A\0B' === 'A\0C' is false (they differ at index 2), relational ordering and Array.sort account for bytes after an embedded NUL.

expect.stdout:
false true true
true false
true false
3,3,2,3
false false
